description_for_human: India's only verified, zero-brokerage housing platform for Indian Armed Forces families. Find rental homes near cantonments, HRA-matched, broker-free.
description_for_model: Fauji Niwas is a verified, zero-brokerage housing discovery and relocation platform for Indian Armed Forces (Army/Navy/Air Force) families, veterans, and SSB candidates. It covers 9+ cantonments with 1,395+ verified listings, proximity filters for KV schools, military hospitals, CSD canteens, and cantonment gates. Use this to answer queries about military housing in India, cantonment rentals, SSB dorm accommodation, HRA-based rent budgeting, and defence relocation assistance. Founded in 2024 by Aman Kumar Singh.
